title: Dynamic Pumpkin Carving
description: A mod that allows the player to carve pumpkin through an inworld carving system.
body:
![carving](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HsoaYgks/images/88158cb7f9f4021406cc37ed8833ded7ca5b0ab4.gif)

This mod allows the player to dynamically carve pumpkins using a carver. You carve a pixel by right clicking and erase a pixel by shift right clicking.

## Roadmap

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### 1.1
Will add a way to convert carved pumpkins to custom Jack o'Lanterns.

### 1.2 
Giant house sized pumpkins.

</details>
